description.value:
Wondrous Item, Rare

Smooth 5-lb smoky gray quartz sphere. Sentient scholar personality. INT 18, Wis and Cha rolled 3d6 each. Speaks 4 languages, sees/hears 60 ft. No goals, can't initiate conflicts. Expert in 4 narrow academic subjects (+9 to recall lore from them). Casts mage hand at will (self-transport only).

Professor Skant (Vellynne's orb): LG, Wis 11, Cha 9. Speaks Common, Draconic, Elvish, Loross. Chatterbox who finds everyone a dunderhead. Expertise: Netheril history, vampirism, Elverquisst liquor, the tarrasque.
